CARD.CARD_EDITOR_CREATED_CARD03.Title: Toxic Bloom
CARD.CARD_EDITOR_CREATED_CARD03.CustomText:
Deal damage equal to {{n1}} times the enemy's [gold]Poison[/gold] to ALL enemies.
Remove all [gold]Poison[/gold] from that enemy.

CARD.CARD_EDITOR_CREATED_CARD04.Title: Violence
CARD.CARD_EDITOR_CREATED_CARD04.CustomText:
Apply {{e:973b4e838e73428788d90e897b53843b}} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to a random enemy for each HP you lost this turn.
[gold]Exhaust[/gold].

CARD.CARD_EDITOR_CREATED_CARD05.Title: Flex
CARD.CARD_EDITOR_CREATED_CARD05.CustomText: Gain {{e:377136aaa218449a8f1f8ec5d765b95d}} Max HP until the end of the enemy's turn.

CARD.CARD_EDITOR_CREATED_CARD06.Title: Invest
CARD.CARD_EDITOR_CREATED_CARD06.CustomText: Enchant a card in your [gold]Hand[/gold] with [gold]Momentum[/gold] {{e:99e31bd58f834acfb1582c8beeeef04c}}.

CARD.CARD_EDITOR_CREATED_CARD07.Title: Fracture
CARD.CARD_EDITOR_CREATED_CARD07.CustomText:
[gold]Evoke[/gold] all [gold]Glass[/gold] Orbs.
[gold]Channel[/gold] {{e:0803f73bae6e4126a61c126be7c95d37}} [gold]Glass[/gold] Orb for each orb you [gold]Evoked[/gold] this turn.

CARD.CARD_EDITOR_CREATED_CARD08.Title: Reserve
CARD.CARD_EDITOR_CREATED_CARD08.CustomText:
Gain {{n1}} block.
Whenever you draw this card, increase its block by {{n2}} until played.

CARD.CARD_EDITOR_CREATED_CARD09.Title: Battle Plan
CARD.CARD_EDITOR_CREATED_CARD09.CustomText:
Search your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] for a card and put it on top.
Increase its energy cost by 1 until played.

CARD.CARD_EDITOR_CREATED_CARD10.Title: Network Growth
CARD.CARD_EDITOR_CREATED_CARD10.CustomText: Every {{e:1f06a3fa03934f9fa2fdaf8b08b8d490}} orbs you [gold]Evoke[/gold], gain {{n2}} Orb Slot.

CARD.CARD_EDITOR_CREATED_CARD11.Title: Bone Rush
CARD.CARD_EDITOR_CREATED_CARD11.CustomText:
[gold]Osty[/gold] deals {{e:ca64f24597864825b9f1ca4c5d57676b}} damage.
If the enemy intends to attack, Summon {{n2}}

CARD.CARD_EDITOR_CREATED_CARD12.Title: Encore
CARD.CARD_EDITOR_CREATED_CARD12.CustomText:
A random card in your ally's [gold]Hand[/gold] gains {{n1}} [gold]Glam[/gold].
[gold]Exhaust[/gold].

CARD.CARD_EDITOR_CREATED_CARD14.Title: Falling Star
CARD.CARD_EDITOR_CREATED_CARD14.CustomText:
This card costs [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/regent_energy_icon.png[/img] less for each [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/star_icon.png[/img] you spent this combat.
Enchant all cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold] with Glam {{n2}}.
CARD.CARD_EDITOR_CREATED_CARD14.CustomTextUpgraded:
This card costs [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/regent_energy_icon.png[/img] less for each [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/star_icon.png[/img] you spent this combat.
Enchant all cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold] with Glam {{e:caa319963b8844f38e32e831503a9ae7}}.
